title: Xtra Fruity Dutch Cherry Crumble
description: A winey and shaggy Dutch dish featuring cherry, this crumble is an energizing Whole30-friendly dessert made with a bain-marie method.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, mix together the almond flour, coconut sugar, shredded coconut, and salt.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the eggs and vanilla extract.
Add the egg mixture to the dry ingredients and stir until well combined.
Gently fold in the fresh cherries and lemon zest.
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish and set it in a larger dish filled with hot water to create a bain-marie.
Bake for 40 minutes or until the topping is golden brown and the fruit is tender.
Remove from the oven and let cool for a few minutes before serving.
Serve warm, garnished with additional fresh cherries if desired.
